This exception thrown if a method has been invoked at an illegal or inappropriate time.

insertCardInBuffer(int, boolean, Coordinate) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferGrid
It inserts a new card in the buffer and enlarges the buffer to be compatible with the new representation
insertCardInBuffer(int, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferTable
It replaces the cards drawn or moved with the new cards to represent on the public card place
insertCardInDeck(int, CardColour) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferTable
It replaces the top of the deck chosen with the back of a coloured card
insertCardsInBuffer(List<Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIDrawBufferHand
It inserts the new hand in the buffer
insertPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.UI.CLI.CLIClassificationBuffer
Inserts the new player in the match in the list of players of the classification

This exception is thrown if a method has been invoked with an unexpected parameter.

InvalidPlacementException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Exceptions
This exception is thrown when the attempt to place a card fails.

InvalidSearchPositionException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Exceptions
This exception is thrown when trying to search for a position on the grid in an unexpected way.

Class constructor, specifying message
invokePingRMI() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.VirtualView.VirtualView
RMI ping equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to periodically check if the connection with the server is still active

RMI ping equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to periodically check if the connection with the server is still active

invokePongRMI() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am12.Client.ClientController.ClientController
RMI pong equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to answer a ping invocation

RMI pong equivalent: this method represents an invocation that is done to answer a ping invocation
invokePongRMI() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am12.ClientStub

Checks if the chosen corner exists (if it is visible or not)
